weapon_type.description: Optional; added in schema version 3. Defaults to SLASHING when omitted.

range_type.description: Optional; added in schema version 5. Defaults to MELEE when omitted. RANGED attacks can be fired at a mob in an adjacent room via the SHOOT command.

damage_type.description: Optional; added in schema version 6. Defaults to PHYSICAL when omitted. Non-physical damage is reduced by the defender's matching *_resist armour stat (e.g. fire_resist), capped so resistance never fully negates a blow.

telegraph_ticks.description: Optional; added in schema version 7. Defaults to 0 (instant resolution) when omitted. When greater than 0 and used as a mob's special attack, the mob announces a TELEGRAPH message and winds up for this many AI ticks before the blow lands, spending its turn channeling instead of also landing a normal hit. The pending attack is cancelled with no damage if the mob dies or the target leaves the fight before it resolves.

applies_effect.description: Optional; added in schema version 4. Describes a status effect this attack applies to its target on a successful hit.

effect_id.description: Must match the id of an EffectDefinition under data/effects/.
